title: PlayerEvent
description: ICD-9: Event message published by the player service to MQTT on every state transition. Consumed by dashboard-api ImpressionRecorder for impression tracking and by any future fleet telemetry subscriber. No images, frame data, or biometric identifiers are permitted.

event_id.description: Stable unique identifier for this event. Used for deduplication.

produced_at.description: UTC RFC 3339 timestamp when the state transition occurred.

event_type.description: The type of player state transition.

manifest_id.description: The manifest that was activated or deactivated. Present for manifest_activated and manifest_deactivated events; null or absent for other event types.

dwell_elapsed.description: Whether the minimum dwell time had elapsed when the manifest was deactivated. Present for manifest_deactivated events; null or absent for other event types.

rule_rationale.description: The ICD-4 activate_creative.rationale value that caused this manifest to be activated. Forwarded for analytics traceability. Present for manifest_activated events; null or absent for others.
